EmailTemplate.name: EmailTemplate-UserTransfer-HR-Approval-Notification
EmailTemplate.Body:
*Note: This is a system generated email, please do not reply to this email.

#set($ctx = $spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.api.SailPointFactory").getMethod("getFactory", null).invoke(null,null).getCurrentContext()) #set($emailTools = $spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.rapidsetup.tools.EmailTools").getMethod("instance", null).invoke(null,null)) #set($reqType = $workflow.requestType) #set($styleSheet = $emailTools.getEmailSection($ctx, "styleSheet")) #set($headerTemplate = $emailTools.getEmailSection($ctx, "headerTemplate")) #set($footerTemplate = $emailTools.getEmailSection($ctx, "footerTemplate")) Hello,

User Transfer HR Approval Notification.

Thank you,
EmailTemplate.Subject: User Transfer HR Approval Notification
